creator: knowledgeispower80@gmail.com
text:
Environment:
FreeBSD Current 11 ppc64


Description:
Spidermonkey170 is a dep. of polkit(libmozjs-17.0.so). This build fail with the following attachment showing the discrepancy. I have tried spidermonkey185 with no avail. I'm using gcc48 to build this. I have used tried the same with the base gcc4.2.1 same error.

How to Repeat:
cd to lang/spidermonkey170 to make install.

Fix:
None tried spidermonkey17. But there is no libmozjs.
